ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., Logistic Regression, SVM, Random Forest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the model belongs to */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the model */,
  "documentation" TEXT /* Detailed documentation for the model */,
  "source_code_path" TEXT /* Path to the source code of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., tabular, image, text) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the evaluation was performed */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version being evaluated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., cross-validation, hold-out) */,
  "evaluation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the evaluation in seconds */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the evaluation was performed (e.g., local, cloud) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_engineering" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature engineering technique */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the feature was applied to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "applied_at" TEXT /* Date when the feature was applied */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the feature was applied to */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "transformation" TEXT /* Transformation applied to the feature (e.g., normalization, one-hot encoding) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the feature on model performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_engineering_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_engineering_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the hyperparameter is used in */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the hyperparameter is used in */,
  "tuning_method" TEXT /* Method used for hyperparameter tuning (e.g., grid search, random search) */,
  "tuning_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the hyperparameter tuning in seconds */,
  "tuning_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the hyperparameter tuning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the version belongs to */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for this version */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training in seconds */,
  "training_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the training process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being deployed */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model is deployed (e.g., production, staging) */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was deployed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "deployed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who deployed the model */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version being deployed */,
  "deployment_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the deployment in seconds */,
  "deployment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_deployed_by FOREIGN KEY ("deployed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the evaluation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "evaluation_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version being accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_evaluation_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)
